falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 equivalent support zone would invalidate the 79% bottom pattern match, as the prior bottom held above this structural level; this would signal continuation lower rather than accumulation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained volatility expansion above panic threshold would contradict the blowoff score of 41 (which implies moderate, not extreme stress), indicating the pattern is not a bottom but a mid-crash consolidation

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further by >25bps from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Deepening curve inversion would signal escalating recession risk not priced in the bottom_2024_aug analog, which occurred during a disinflationary soft-landing narrative; this would break the macro regime similarity

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
